features.name: Create environment configuration module
features.description: Add a single source of truth for required runtime environment variables and feature flags.

features.name: Create shared TypeScript domain types
features.description: Define shared application types for users, threads, messages, drafts, voices, imports, and assets.

features.name: Create Supabase database wrapper
features.description: Centralize Supabase access inside `lib/db.ts` for all persistence operations.

features.name: Create OpenAI wrapper
features.description: Centralize model access inside `lib/ai.ts` instead of calling the API directly from routes or components.

features.name: Create agent orchestration module
features.description: Add `lib/agents/` orchestration for draft generation and revision decisions.

features.name: Create JSON response helper
features.description: Standardize API responses to the required `{ success, data, error }` envelope.

features.name: Create request validation helper
features.description: Add reusable input validation utilities for route payloads and query parameters.

features.name: Create authenticated API helper
features.description: Add a shared auth guard for API routes that require a signed-in user.

features.name: Create app error boundary
features.description: Add a top-level error boundary for graceful handling of unexpected UI failures.

features.name: Create loading state primitives
features.description: Define consistent loading components for auth, chat, drafts, uploads, and settings.

features.name: Create empty state primitives
features.description: Define reusable empty states for threads, voices, drafts, and imports.

features.name: Create toast and feedback system
features.description: Add lightweight user feedback for copy, save, upload, and import outcomes.

features.name: Create clipboard utility
features.description: Add a shared clipboard helper for copying the current draft text.

features.name: Create external link utility
features.description: Add a safe helper for external navigation such as opening LinkedIn.

features.name: Create timestamp formatting utility
features.description: Add a shared formatter for thread, message, draft, and import timestamps.

features.name: Create storage asset URL utility
features.description: Add a helper for generating preview URLs for stored uploaded assets.

features.name: Create local-only feature flag helper
features.description: Add a single helper for development-only capabilities such as auto-login.

features.name: Create generation audit event table
features.description: Persist generation audit records for debugging and product insight.

features.name: Create generation audit logging service
features.description: Add a shared service for writing generation success and failure audit events.

features.name: Create analytics event taxonomy
features.description: Define a stable set of product analytics events for key workflow milestones.

features.name: Create user profiles migration
features.description: Add the persistent user profile table required for account-level metadata.

features.name: Create user profile fetch helper
features.description: Add a shared database helper for loading the current user's profile.

features.name: Sync profile on first sign-in
features.description: Create or update a user profile record the first time a user authenticates.

features.name: Add Google OAuth sign-in screen
features.description: Provide a Google sign-in path for authenticated workspace access.

features.name: Add magic link sign-in screen
features.description: Provide an email magic link sign-in path for authenticated workspace access.

features.name: Add auth callback handler
features.description: Handle OAuth and magic link completion and transition users into the workspace.

features.name: Add signed-out route protection
features.description: Prevent anonymous users from accessing the authenticated workspace.

features.name: Add authenticated workspace redirect
features.description: Send authenticated users directly to the main workspace experience.

features.name: Add sign-out control
features.description: Let authenticated users end their session from the product UI.

features.name: Add sidebar profile summary
features.description: Show the current user's account identity in the quiet left sidebar.

features.name: Add basic account settings panel
features.description: Provide a lightweight settings surface for account and workspace controls.

features.name: Add account email display
features.description: Show the signed-in email address in account settings for clarity.

features.name: Add editable display name setting
features.description: Let users manage the display name associated with their profile.

features.name: Add auth bootstrap loading state
features.description: Show a clean loading experience while the session state is being resolved.

features.name: Add auth error messaging
features.description: Surface authentication failures without exposing raw provider errors.

features.name: Add session refresh handling
features.description: Keep the authenticated workspace usable across normal session refresh behavior.

features.name: Add unauthorized API response behavior
features.description: Return consistent unauthenticated and unauthorized JSON errors from protected routes.

features.name: Add local test-account seeding lookup
features.description: Provide a development-only path to identify the seeded local test user.

features.name: Add dev auto-login environment gate
features.description: Require an explicit local environment flag before auto-login can execute.

features.name: Add preview and production auto-login deny behavior
features.description: Hard-block the dev auto-login path outside local development environments.

features.name: Create full-height workspace frame
features.description: Build the primary authenticated layout with a full-height focused workspace.

features.name: Create minimal left sidebar layout
features.description: Build the visually quiet sidebar for history, profile, and settings entry points.

features.name: Create center chat panel layout
features.description: Build the main working surface for conversation and composition.

features.name: Create hidden draft panel region
features.description: Define the right-side draft panel container that starts hidden before a draft exists.

features.name: Add animated draft panel reveal
features.description: Animate the transition from two-panel to three-panel workspace once a draft appears.

features.name: Add responsive narrow-screen workspace behavior
features.description: Preserve the product's core workflow on smaller screens without cluttering the layout.

features.name: Add new chat action placement
features.description: Place a clear new chat action inside the left sidebar.

features.name: Create thread history list surface
features.description: Add the sidebar surface that will display prior chat threads.

features.name: Add active thread highlighting
features.description: Visually distinguish the currently open thread inside the conversation history list.

features.name: Add sidebar scroll behavior
features.description: Keep the sidebar usable as thread history grows longer over time.

features.name: Add bottom-aligned settings entry
features.description: Anchor the settings entry near the bottom of the left sidebar.

features.name: Create minimal conversation header
features.description: Add lightweight top-of-chat context without introducing heavy navigation chrome.

features.name: Create chat message list container
features.description: Add the scrolling conversation region for thread messages.

features.name: Create newest-message auto-scroll region
features.description: Keep the latest part of the conversation visible as messages are added.

features.name: Create bottom-anchored composer
features.description: Place the chat input at the bottom of the center panel as the primary action area.

features.name: Create composer voice selector slot
features.description: Reserve a clear place in the composer for voice selection.

features.name: Create composer image upload slot
features.description: Reserve a clear place in the composer for attaching an image.

features.name: Create draft metadata header region
features.description: Add the right-panel header area for metadata such as voice and last updated time.

features.name: Create draft image preview slot
features.description: Add a dedicated area in the draft panel for the attached image preview.

features.name: Create draft action row
features.description: Add a right-panel action row for copy and LinkedIn handoff actions.

features.name: Create chat threads migration
features.description: Add the persistent table for user-owned chat threads.

features.name: Create chat messages migration
features.description: Add the persistent table for ordered messages within each thread.

features.name: Add thread ownership enforcement
features.description: Prevent users from reading or mutating threads they do not own.

features.name: Create thread creation service
features.description: Add a shared service for creating a new empty chat thread.

features.name: Add new-thread UI action
features.description: Let users create a new thread directly from the sidebar.

features.name: Persist placeholder thread title
features.description: Store an initial title for each thread before a better summary is available.

features.name: Create thread list query
features.description: Add a user-scoped query for retrieving recent thread history.

features.name: Bind sidebar history list to thread data
features.description: Render persisted thread history inside the sidebar surface.

features.name: Add thread reopen action
features.description: Let users reopen an existing thread from conversation history.

features.name: Restore message history on reopen
features.description: Load the full conversation stream when a saved thread is reopened.

features.name: Restore draft context on reopen
features.description: Reconnect the reopened thread to its current draft context in the workspace.

features.name: Submit user message from composer
features.description: Send a new user message from the chat composer into the active thread.

features.name: Block empty message submission
features.description: Prevent blank chat sends from creating empty conversation turns.

features.name: Add multiline composer input
features.description: Support natural long-form drafting prompts inside the chat input.

features.name: Add pending state during message send
features.description: Show the composer and thread in a sending state while a message is being processed.

features.name: Persist user message row
features.description: Save each submitted user message to the thread message history.

features.name: Persist assistant message row
features.description: Save each assistant response to the thread message history.

features.name: Render user message bubble
features.description: Display user-authored messages inside the conversation stream.

features.name: Render assistant message bubble
features.description: Display assistant-authored messages inside the conversation stream.

features.name: Auto-scroll after new messages
features.description: Keep the newest user and assistant turns visible as the thread grows.

features.name: Add failed send retry control
features.description: Let users retry a message send after a transient failure.

features.name: Rename thread from first prompt
features.description: Replace the placeholder thread title with a more meaningful summary after initial use.

features.name: Order threads by recent activity
features.description: Sort thread history by most recently active conversation.

features.name: Show thread last-message preview
features.description: Display a short content preview for each saved thread in the sidebar.

features.name: Show thread timestamp in history
features.description: Display recent thread activity times in the sidebar history list.

features.name: Add empty chat onboarding state
features.description: Guide the user when no active thread content exists yet.

features.name: Continue prior thread after reopen
features.description: Allow new messages to continue the same saved thread seamlessly after reopen.

features.name: Prevent cross-thread state leakage
features.description: Keep messages, drafts, voice, and uploads scoped to the active thread only.

features.name: Add Enter-to-send shortcut
features.description: Support quick chat submission from the composer keyboard flow.

features.name: Add Shift+Enter newline behavior
features.description: Preserve multiline message authoring without sending the composer unexpectedly.

features.name: Create drafts migration
features.description: Add the persistent table for the single active draft associated with a thread.

features.name: Create draft revisions migration
features.description: Add the persistent table for saved draft revision history.

features.name: Enforce one active draft per thread
features.description: Make the one-thread-to-one-active-draft product rule explicit in persistence logic.

features.name: Create draft fetch helper
features.description: Add a shared database helper for loading the current draft for a thread.

features.name: Create draft persistence helper
features.description: Add a shared service for creating and updating draft records.

features.name: Add readiness evaluation before first draft
features.description: Decide when the conversation has enough signal to generate the first post draft.

features.name: Add first-draft trigger from message flow
features.description: Connect chat message processing to initial draft generation once readiness is reached.

features.name: Create initial active draft record
features.description: Persist the first generated LinkedIn draft for the thread.

features.name: Save initial draft revision snapshot
features.description: Create the first revision record when the initial draft is generated.

features.name: Reveal right panel on first draft
features.description: Show the draft panel once the first draft has been created.

features.name: Keep draft panel hidden before draft exists
features.description: Preserve the two-panel layout until an active draft is available.

features.name: Load latest draft into panel
features.description: Bind the current thread's active draft to the right-panel display.

features.name: Render latest draft text
features.description: Display the active LinkedIn post text in the draft panel.

features.name: Add copy draft action
features.description: Let users copy the current draft text with one action.

features.name: Add clipboard success feedback
features.description: Confirm to the user when the draft has been copied successfully.

features.name: Add clipboard failure feedback
features.description: Show a recoverable error state when copying the draft fails.

features.name: Add Go to LinkedIn action
features.description: Provide a direct handoff action from the draft panel to LinkedIn.

features.name: Open LinkedIn in new tab
features.description: Launch the manual posting handoff without disrupting the current workspace session.

features.name: Persist active voice metadata on draft
features.description: Store which voice shaped the current draft version.

features.name: Persist last-updated timestamp on draft
features.description: Track when the active draft was last changed.

features.name: Render draft metadata row
features.description: Display lightweight draft metadata such as voice and last updated time.

features.name: Add refinement trigger from later chat turns
features.description: Use subsequent chat messages to revise the current draft instead of starting over.

features.name: Use current draft as revision input
features.description: Feed the existing draft back into the generation flow during refinements.

features.name: Update active draft on refinement
features.description: Persist revisions to the active draft record after later chat instructions.

features.name: Save revision snapshot on refinement
features.description: Write a new revision record every time the active draft is updated.

features.name: Restore latest draft on thread reopen
features.description: Reload the most recent active draft when a saved thread is reopened.

features.name: Add draft generation loading state
features.description: Show that the assistant is producing or revising a draft in the right panel.

features.name: Add draft generation error state
features.description: Explain draft generation failures without collapsing the workspace flow.

features.name: Keep draft visible while chat continues
features.description: Preserve the right-panel deliverable while the user keeps refining via chat.

features.name: Prevent draft branching by default
features.description: Keep v1 focused on a single active draft instead of multiple competing branches.

features.name: Load thread context for generation
features.description: Provide the active thread messages to the assistant generation flow.

features.name: Load selected voice context for generation
features.description: Provide the currently selected voice profile to the assistant generation flow.

features.name: Load imported samples for generation
features.description: Provide imported writing samples to generation when a voice has them.

features.name: Build system prompt from product boundaries
features.description: Encode v1 product constraints and desired assistant behavior in the generation system prompt.

features.name: Build conversation context prompt
features.description: Assemble the active thread history into a clean prompt input for the assistant.

features.name: Classify exploratory versus ready-to-draft state
features.description: Distinguish early exploratory chat from threads that are ready for draft output.

features.name: Avoid premature draft generation
features.description: Tune the assistant to avoid creating drafts too early on low-signal threads.

features.name: Revise existing draft instead of branching
features.description: Use the current draft as the revision target after the first draft exists.

features.name: Add explicit agent termination conditions
features.description: Ensure every generation flow has a clear stop condition.

features.name: Prevent arbitrary long-running agent loops
features.description: Keep the assistant bounded to the product's controlled drafting workflow.

features.name: Prevent non-product third-party tool calls
features.description: Restrict the assistant to explicitly supported product actions only.

features.name: Include attached image context in generation metadata
features.description: Pass the existence of an attached image into generation context without turning v1 into image generation.

features.name: Create structured generation result contract
features.description: Return assistant outputs in a stable structure that the routes and draft pipeline can consume.

features.name: Log generation success audit events
features.description: Record successful generation outcomes for later debugging and analysis.

features.name: Log generation failure audit events
features.description: Record failed generation attempts for later debugging and analysis.

features.name: Store model identifier in audit events
features.description: Capture which model produced or attempted the generation result.

features.name: Store generation latency in audit events
features.description: Capture generation duration for performance and debugging analysis.

features.name: Store revision reason in audit events
features.description: Persist whether a generation was an initial draft or a refinement request.

features.name: Honor selected voice instructions during generation
features.description: Apply the chosen voice's instructions and style cues to generated drafts.

features.name: Honor one-draft-per-thread contract in orchestration
features.description: Keep the agent orchestration aligned with the single active draft product rule.

features.name: Create voice profiles migration
features.description: Add the persistent table for reusable writing voices.

features.name: Create voice samples migration
features.description: Add the persistent table for imported or pasted voice samples.

features.name: Add voice ownership enforcement
features.description: Prevent users from reading or mutating voices they do not own.

features.name: Create voice fetch and list helper
features.description: Add shared data access for listing and loading voice profiles.

features.name: Create voice creation form UI
features.description: Add the UI for creating a new reusable writing voice.

features.name: Validate voice name input
features.description: Require a valid voice name before a voice can be saved.

features.name: Validate voice description length
features.description: Constrain optional voice descriptions to a predictable size.

features.name: Validate voice instruction input
features.description: Require voice instructions to be well-formed before persisting them.

features.name: Persist new voice record
features.description: Save a newly created voice profile for the current user.

features.name: Persist voice updates
features.description: Save edits to an existing voice profile.

features.name: Add delete voice confirmation UI
features.description: Require a deliberate confirmation step before removing a voice.

features.name: Delete voice record
features.description: Remove a saved voice profile and its associated usage path from the account.

features.name: Create voice list view
features.description: Display all saved voices inside the lightweight settings workflow.

features.name: Add voice empty state
features.description: Guide the user when no reusable voices have been created yet.

features.name: Create voice detail and edit view
features.description: Show a single voice with edit controls and import options.

features.name: Create composer voice selector dropdown
features.description: Let the user choose a saved voice directly in the chat workflow.

features.name: Persist selected voice on thread
features.description: Store the chosen voice as part of the thread's drafting context.

features.name: Restore selected voice on thread reopen
features.description: Reload the previously selected voice when a thread is reopened.

features.name: Show active voice in composer
features.description: Keep the currently selected voice visible near the composer.

features.name: Allow switching voice mid-thread
features.description: Let the user change voices during a conversation without losing prior thread state.

features.name: Apply new voice only to future generations
features.description: Ensure a voice switch affects subsequent drafts and refinements instead of rewriting history.

features.name: Show active voice in draft metadata
features.description: Display the voice that shaped the current draft inside the right panel.

features.name: Prevent selecting deleted voices
features.description: Keep removed voices from remaining selectable in active threads.

features.name: Default voice ordering by recent use
features.description: Sort available voices using the user's recent usage pattern.

features.name: Persist voice last-used timestamp
features.description: Track when each voice was last selected so recent-use ordering is possible.

features.name: Add manual import entry point
features.description: Provide a manual voice import action inside the voice detail workflow.

features.name: Add pasted-text import form
features.description: Let the user paste prior writing samples directly into the product.

features.name: Add text-file import form
features.description: Let the user upload a plain text file for manual voice enrichment.

features.name: Add CSV import form
features.description: Let the user upload a CSV file for manual voice enrichment.

features.name: Validate manual import file type
features.description: Reject unsupported file formats for manual voice imports.

features.name: Validate manual import file size
features.description: Reject overly large manual import uploads before parsing.

features.name: Parse pasted text into sample rows
features.description: Convert pasted manual input into normalized voice sample records.

features.name: Parse text file upload into sample rows
features.description: Convert uploaded text files into normalized voice sample records.

features.name: Parse CSV upload into sample rows
features.description: Convert uploaded CSV rows into normalized voice sample records.

features.name: Preview parsed manual sample count
features.description: Show how many writing samples were parsed before the manual import is saved.

features.name: Persist manual import batch record
features.description: Store a record of each manual import action for later reference.

features.name: Persist imported sample rows
features.description: Save parsed manual sample content for a voice profile.

features.name: Associate imported samples to voice
features.description: Link imported sample records to the selected voice profile.

features.name: Add manual import success summary
features.description: Confirm how many samples were imported successfully after a manual import completes.

features.name: Add manual import failure messaging
features.description: Explain parsing and save failures during manual voice import.

features.name: Add LinkedIn import entry point
features.description: Provide a separate voice import path for LinkedIn-based retrieval when available.

features.name: Add LinkedIn import availability flag
features.description: Gate LinkedIn import behind an explicit availability signal instead of assuming access exists.

features.name: Disable LinkedIn import when unavailable
features.description: Prevent unusable LinkedIn import flows from appearing active when the integration is not available.

features.name: Add LinkedIn connection prompt placeholder
features.description: Provide the user-facing entry step for LinkedIn import without assuming universal access.

features.name: Fetch user's own LinkedIn posts when enabled
features.description: Retrieve user-owned LinkedIn writing history only when the supported integration is available.

features.name: Preview LinkedIn sample count
features.description: Show how many writing samples will be imported from LinkedIn before saving them.

features.name: Persist LinkedIn import batch record
features.description: Store a record of each LinkedIn import action for later reference.

features.name: Persist LinkedIn-derived samples
features.description: Save LinkedIn import results as reusable voice samples.

features.name: Add fallback from blocked LinkedIn import to manual import
features.description: Direct the user to manual import whenever LinkedIn import cannot proceed.

features.name: Add import history view on voice
features.description: Show prior manual and LinkedIn import activity for a voice profile.

features.name: Create uploaded assets migration
features.description: Add the persistent table for uploaded images associated with drafts.

features.name: Add image upload action in composer
features.description: Let the user start an image upload from the chat composer area.

features.name: Restrict file picker to image types
features.description: Limit uploads to supported image formats in the composer.

features.name: Validate image MIME type
features.description: Reject non-image uploads before storage or association occurs.

features.name: Validate image size
features.description: Reject image uploads that exceed the product's file size allowance.

features.name: Upload image binary to storage
features.description: Store the selected image in a persistent storage location.

features.name: Persist uploaded asset metadata
features.description: Save the uploaded image record and its storage metadata.

features.name: Attach uploaded asset to active draft
features.description: Associate the uploaded image with the current thread draft.

features.name: Restore attached image on reopen
features.description: Reload the draft's attached image when a thread is reopened.

features.name: Render attached image preview in draft panel
features.description: Show the uploaded image alongside the current draft in the right panel.

features.name: Replace attached image with new upload
features.description: Allow the active draft's image to be swapped for a newer upload.

features.name: Add upload progress indicator
features.description: Show progress while the selected image is being uploaded.

features.name: Add upload failure messaging
features.description: Show a clear recoverable error when image upload fails.

features.name: Generate secure preview URL
features.description: Generate a safe URL for rendering stored uploaded images in the UI.

features.name: Persist asset association across sessions
features.description: Keep the image attached to the draft after reloads and later revisits.

features.name: Implement POST /api/chat/threads route
features.description: Create the route for starting a new chat thread.

features.name: Implement GET /api/chat/threads route
features.description: Create the route for listing the current user's chat threads.

features.name: Implement GET /api/chat/threads/:id route
features.description: Create the route for loading a single thread with its current context.

features.name: Implement POST /api/chat/threads/:id/messages route
features.description: Create the route for appending a message and triggering the assistant workflow.

features.name: Implement GET /api/voices route
features.description: Create the route for listing the current user's saved voices.

features.name: Implement POST /api/voices route
features.description: Create the route for creating a new voice profile.

features.name: Implement PATCH /api/voices route
features.description: Create the route for updating an existing voice profile.

features.name: Implement DELETE /api/voices route
features.description: Create the route for deleting an existing voice profile.

features.name: Implement POST /api/voices/import-linkedin route
features.description: Create the route for LinkedIn-based voice import when the integration is available.

features.name: Implement POST /api/voices/import-manual route
features.description: Create the route for manual voice import from pasted text or uploaded files.

features.name: Implement GET /api/drafts route
features.description: Create the route for loading the active draft for a thread.

features.name: Implement POST /api/drafts route
features.description: Create the route for persisting a newly generated draft record.

features.name: Implement PATCH /api/drafts route
features.description: Create the route for updating an existing draft and its revision history.

features.name: Implement POST /api/uploads route
features.description: Create the route for validating, storing, and recording uploaded draft images.

features.name: Implement POST /api/dev/auto-login route
features.description: Create the development-only route for local seeded-account auto-login.

features.name: Add lightweight settings entry in sidebar
features.description: Expose the settings workflow from the sidebar without introducing complex navigation.

features.name: Add settings panel open and close behavior
features.description: Let users open and dismiss the lightweight settings experience cleanly.

features.name: Track time-to-first-draft event
features.description: Record the elapsed time from a user's first message to their first generated draft.

features.name: Track draft-copied event
features.description: Record when a user copies the current draft.

features.name: Track draft-refined event
features.description: Record when an existing draft receives a refinement update.

features.name: Track voice-selected event
features.description: Record when a user selects or switches the active writing voice.

features.name: Track import-completed event
features.description: Record successful voice enrichment imports from manual and LinkedIn flows.

features.name: Add API route error logging
features.description: Capture route-level failures in a consistent debugging log path.

features.name: Add JSON envelope compliance tests
features.description: Verify all planned API routes return the standard response envelope shape.

features.name: Add auth guard tests
features.description: Verify protected UI and API flows reject unauthenticated access correctly.

features.name: Add thread persistence tests
features.description: Verify thread creation, listing, reopening, and message restoration behavior.

features.name: Add draft revision persistence tests
features.description: Verify initial draft creation and later refinements create the expected revision history.

features.name: Add voice CRUD tests
features.description: Verify voice creation, editing, deletion, and selection behaviors.

features.name: Add import parser tests
features.description: Verify pasted text, text file, CSV, and LinkedIn import parsing behavior.

features.name: Add dev auto-login environment gate tests
features.description: Verify auto-login works only when explicitly enabled in local development.
